text:
USA's Olympic committee is reportedly giving away a handsome payout for Olympic medal winners from their nation, be it gold, silver or bronze, but the amounts are to vary. Team USA managed to achieve the highest medal count and has emerged in the top-3 in the Paris Olympics medal tally as well.
